camera-not-in-solar-system.title: Camera is not in the Solar System.
camera-not-in-solar-system.description: You need to be in the Solar System to use the SkyBrowser.

telescope-view.no-skybrowser: There are no SkyBrowsers. Create on in the SkyBrowser panel.
telescope-view.error: ERROR: Cannot display the AAS WorldWide Telescope research app

error.unable-to-load-wwt: Could not load WorldWide Telescope images
error.unable-to-load-images: Could not load image collection. Error: {{error}}

image-list.no-images-in-view: No images in view. Try moving the sky target

added-image-list.no-images: No images added to this browser

display-copies.tooltip: Settings for Display Copies, which are a way to render the WorldWide Telescope view as a ScreenSpaceRenderable.

number-of-copies.label: Number of Copies
number-of-copies.tooltip: Number of copies to add at once.

position-for-copies.tooltip: This sets the position of the first display copy. The additional copies will be evenly spread out on the Azimuth, if isUsingRadiusAzimuthElevation is enabled, otherwise it will spread on the Y axis.
position-for-copies.label: Position for first copy

show-hover-indicator.label: Show image position on hover
show-hover-indicator.info: Show an indicator on the sky in OpenSpace when hovering or focusing images in the SkyBrowser lists. The position of the indicator matches the position of the image interacted with.
show-hover-indicator.disabled-tooltip: No scene graph node for the hover indicator was found. Make sure that the SkyBrowser is properly configured and that the hover indicator asset is loaded.

center-skybrowser.tooltip: Move target to center of view
center-skybrowser.aria-label: Move skybrowser target to center of view
